beats.n_start: {HERO} and {COMPANION} find {MAP} inside a dusty jar under {ROUTE_A_LURE} in {THRESHOLD}; {MAP} is hand-drawn, showing {MAP_LINE} and {TREASURE_MARK} somewhere at the end; the friends grin and decide which landmark on the map to follow first; sunny, safe, and excited
beats.o_intro: {MAP_LINE} points first to {ROUTE_A_LURE} at the top of {THRESHOLD}; {HERO} holds {MAP} while {COMPANION} counts the paces; {ROUTE_A_LURE} is so big that three kids could hide behind it; {MAP_LINE} seems to split near its roots
beats.o_fork: at the foot of {ROUTE_A_LURE} {MAP_LINE} splits into two faint trails; one wiggles toward {A1_LANDMARK1} where {A1_SIGN} calls out, the other loops toward {A2_LANDMARK1}; the friends decide which way the map means
beats.o_hollow_1: they follow the trail to {A1_LANDMARK1} lying in the long grass; it is bigger than a barrel and one end is dark and cool; {A1_SIGN} comes from somewhere deep inside it
beats.o_hollow_2: {HERO} peeks into {A1_LANDMARK1} with her flashlight while {COMPANION} checks {MAP}; {MAP_LINE} seems to go right through the log and out the other side; {A1_SIGN} grows busier, like a tiny cheerful crowd
beats.o_hollow_app: past {A1_LANDMARK1} {MAP} is smudged by an old raindrop and two little paths lead away; one is {A1_DEADEND_PATH}, the other is {A1_ONWARD_PATH}; they must guess which one the mapmaker meant
beats.o_hollow_3: {A1_ONWARD_PATH} is springy and cool under their sneakers; ferns brush their knees and {A1_SIGN} grows louder and happier; {COMPANION} whispers that it sounds like hundreds of tiny voices all talking at once
beats.o_hollow_4: the path dips into {A1_ZONE_HINT} where the ground is soft; each stone looks a little like a tiny doorway; the friends step carefully and follow {MAP_LINE} deeper
beats.o_hollow_5: in {A1_ZONE_HINT} they find {A1_RING} set out like a tiny wall; behind it, {A1_CREATURES} sit on leaf-thrones and lily-pad chairs; not one of them hops away
beats.o_hollow_6: {A1_LEADER} wears {A1_CROWN} and blinks slowly at the visitors; {HERO} and {COMPANION} kneel down very gently so they will not frighten anyone; {TREASURE_MARK} is drawn right here in the corner
beats.o_swing_1: they follow the loop of the trail to {A2_LANDMARK1} hanging from a low branch of {ROUTE_A_LURE}; the tire turns slowly in the breeze; someone has tied {A2_DETAIL1} to the rope that flutter and shine
beats.o_swing_2: {COMPANION} gives the tire a gentle push and hears {A2_SIGN} from higher up in {ROUTE_A_LURE}; {HERO} looks at {MAP}, where {MAP_LINE} climbs the trunk toward the leaves; {A2_SIGN} sounds just like tiny bells
beats.o_swing_app: {MAP_LINE} splits at a knot in the trunk; one branch goes toward {A2_DEADEND_PATH}, the other goes along {A2_ONWARD_PATH} that is easy to walk; the friends choose which way to follow the ringing
beats.o_swing_3: {A2_ONWARD_PATH} is easy to balance along, and {A2_SIGN} gets clearer with every step; {HERO} keeps one hand on the trunk while {COMPANION} watches {MAP}; the branch curves toward {A2_ZONE_HINT}
beats.o_swing_4: they reach {A2_ZONE_HINT} where hundreds of little things dangle from the twigs on bits of string; {A2_DANGLERS} all knock together in the wind; the whole tree seems to be singing softly
beats.o_swing_5: someone long ago hung {A2_CHIMES} on every branch of this hidden corner of {ROUTE_A_LURE}; sunlight bounces off the shiny bits and scatters little rainbows on the leaves; the friends stand very still and just listen
beats.o_swing_6: in the middle of the singing branches hangs {A2_BIG_CHIME}; {TREASURE_MARK} floats right beside it; {HERO} reaches out and gives it the gentlest touch
beats.r_intro: {MAP_LINE} points next across the lawn to {ROUTE_B_LURE} near the fence; {COMPANION} hops over a flowerbed while {HERO} reads {MAP}; the shed door hangs open just a crack, and something inside gives a soft creak
beats.r_fork: behind {ROUTE_B_LURE} the trail on {MAP} splits in two; one line slips inside {ROUTE_B_LURE}'s open door into the cool shadows, the other runs off toward {B2_LANDMARK1} stacked against the back fence; the friends pick which to explore
beats.r_shed_1: they push {ROUTE_B_LURE}'s door open and dusty golden light spills across old flowerpots and coiled hoses; it smells of soil and dry wood; {MAP_LINE} leads to {B1_LANDMARK1}
beats.r_shed_2: {HERO} tiptoes past rakes and watering cans while {COMPANION} holds {MAP} steady; in {B1_LANDMARK1} {B1_CRATES} is piled up like steps, and {B1_ZONE_HINT} glows; something up there looks cozy
beats.r_shed_app: {MAP} is torn right at this spot and two ways go on; {B1_DEADEND_PATH} leads into the dark, and {B1_ONWARD_PATH} climbs up toward {B1_ZONE_HINT}; the friends decide which way {TREASURE_MARK} wants them to go
beats.r_shed_3: {B1_ONWARD_PATH} wobbles just a little but holds, and the friends climb toward {B1_ZONE_HINT}; {COMPANION} goes first and gasps softly at what he sees; {HERO} scrambles up right behind him
beats.r_shed_4: up past {B1_ZONE_HINT} someone has built {B1_LOFT} from {B1_FURNISHINGS} and a lantern that runs on batteries; {B1_SIGN_BOARD} hangs above the doorway; it feels warm and secret
beats.r_shed_5: inside {B1_LOFT} are two comfy seats, a shelf of adventure books, and a jar of shiny paper stars; a blanket is folded neatly in the corner as if it is waiting for visitors; {TREASURE_MARK} is right here
beats.r_shed_6: {B1_SIGN_BOARD} over the doorway reads Explorers Welcome in bright friendly letters; {HERO} and {COMPANION} realize this must be a secret fort built by kids long ago and left ready for whoever found the map next; they step inside like honored guests
beats.r_rock_1: the other line leads to {B2_LANDMARK1}, warm from the afternoon sun; a few marigolds grow in the cracks; {MAP_LINE} points to {B2_STONE} near the bottom
beats.r_rock_2: {COMPANION} taps {B2_STONE} and it sounds hollow, like there is a space underneath; {HERO} checks {MAP}, where {TREASURE_MARK} sits just below the rocks; {B2_ZONE_HINT} seems to mark the very spot
beats.r_rock_app: two small arrows are scratched faintly on {B2_STONE}; one arrow points toward {B2_DEADEND_PATH}, the other points down at {B2_ONWARD_PATH} right beneath the stone; the friends choose where to look
beats.r_rock_3: they gently lift {B2_STONE} aside, and underneath {B2_ONWARD_PATH} is soft and easy to brush away; {COMPANION} digs with a garden trowel while {HERO} cups her hands; something smooth and round soon appears
beats.r_rock_4: {B2_BOX} with a rusty latch sits nestled in the sand, just where {TREASURE_MARK} promised; it is exactly the size for two hands to lift; the friends carefully wiggle it free and blow the dust off the lid
beats.r_rock_5: the latch pops open with a happy click and inside, wrapped in {B2_NOTE}, is {B2_TREASURE}; they catch the sunlight in swirls of blue, green, and gold; {HERO} gasps with delight
beats.r_rock_6: there are cats-eyes, swirlies, and one big shooter as clear as a raindrop, dozens of marbles saved by some other kid years and years ago; {B2_NOTE} simply says share and enjoy; the friends read it twice
beats.s_intro: the last part of {MAP_LINE} runs down the sloping lawn to {ROUTE_C_LURE} at the bottom of {THRESHOLD} where it meets the park; the water chatters over smooth stones; {COMPANION} holds {MAP} high so it will not get wet
beats.s_fork: down by the water {MAP_LINE} splits one final time; one branch curves into {C1_LANDMARK1} along the bank, the other hops out across {C2_LANDMARK1} to the far side of the stream; the friends decide which way the treasure lies
beats.s_bramble_1: they follow the line into the shade of {C1_LANDMARK1}, heavy with ripe purple berries; the leaves make a cool green tunnel; from somewhere deeper inside comes {C1_SIGN}
beats.s_bramble_2: {HERO} holds a branch aside so no thorns catch their sleeves, and {C1_SIGN} comes again, closer this time; {COMPANION} checks {MAP}, where {MAP_LINE} winds right into the middle of the bramble patch; they step in gently
beats.s_bramble_app: inside the bushes the trail on {MAP} is faded and two little tunnels lead on through the leaves; one tunnel goes low toward {C1_DEADEND_PATH}, the other goes toward {C1_ONWARD_PATH} where {C1_SIGN} sounds happiest; they pick a way
beats.s_bramble_3: {C1_ONWARD_PATH} opens into {C1_ZONE_HINT} right in the heart of the brambles, floored with soft dry leaves; {C1_SIGN} turns into a rumbly purr; two green eyes blink at them from a warm nest of grass
beats.s_bramble_4: {C1_CAT} with white paws is curled up in {C1_ZONE_HINT}, and it does not run away at all; instead it stretches, yawns, and pads right over to say hello; it wears {C1_COLLAR}
beats.s_bramble_5: {C1_CAT} winds around their ankles, purring like a tiny engine, and flops over for a belly rub; the friends laugh and stroke its soft fur; {TREASURE_MARK} is drawn right where the cat has made its cozy hideaway
beats.s_bramble_6: {C1_COLLAR} has {C1_TAG} that reads Pepper, please be my friend, but no address at all; the cat clearly knows {C1_ZONE_HINT} well and treats the friends like old pals; {HERO} and {COMPANION} wonder if it has been waiting for the map to be found
beats.s_bank_1: {C2_LANDMARK1} cross the chattering stream in a neat flat row, dry on top and easy to hop; the friends cross one careful stone at a time to the mossy far bank; {MAP_LINE} points to the roots of {C2_TREE}
beats.s_bank_2: on the far bank {C2_TREE} trails its long green fingers in the water, and the ground beneath its roots is soft and cool; {COMPANION} studies {MAP}, where {TREASURE_MARK} sits tucked among the tangled roots; {C2_ZONE_HINT} shows in the shade
beats.s_bank_app: two hollows show among the roots of {C2_TREE}; one is {C2_DEADEND_PATH} right at the water's edge, the other is {C2_ONWARD_PATH} a little higher up where {C2_ZONE_HINT} comes from; the friends choose where {TREASURE_MARK} is pointing
beats.s_bank_3: {C2_ONWARD_PATH} is just the right size to kneel in, and {C2_ZONE_HINT} comes from something half-buried in the cool soil; {HERO} brushes the earth away gently while {COMPANION} holds the willow branches back; a corner of metal appears
beats.s_bank_4: it is {C2_TIN}, green at the edges but still shut tight, exactly where {TREASURE_MARK} promised; the friends work the stiff lid with careful fingers; at last it opens with a soft puff of old air
beats.s_bank_5: inside {C2_TIN}, gleaming on a bed of faded velvet, is a heap of {C2_BUTTONS}; brass buttons, glass buttons, and pearly ones shaped like little flowers; they sparkle like real jewels in the dappled light
beats.s_bank_6: someone has kept {C2_BUTTONS} safe here for years, each one different and lovely, a true backyard treasure; {C2_NOTE} inside reads for the finder, with love; the friends feel like they have opened a chest of pirate gold
beats.e_set_hollow: {A1_DEADEND_PATH} just curves back to the fence and stops at a pile of old {A1_DEADEND_FIND}, with no {TREASURE_MARK} and no treasure in sight; the friends laugh, roll up {MAP}, and skip back to {ENTRANCE} for {COMFORT_TREAT}, happy to try again tomorrow
beats.e_toad_king: the friends have found {A1_PRIZE} hidden in {A1_ZONE_HINT}, with {A1_LEADER} wearing {A1_CROWN} on his leafy throne; they promise to keep it secret and safe, and leave a soft green leaf as a gift; all the way home they can hardly stop grinning
beats.e_set_swing: {A2_DEADEND_PATH} is a tangle of twigs that leads nowhere but an empty {A2_DEADEND_FIND}; the friends give up on that route with a giggle, hop off {A2_LANDMARK1}, and head back to {ENTRANCE} for {COMFORT_TREAT} and a rest, sure {TREASURE_MARK} is hiding somewhere else
beats.e_chime: the friends have found {A2_PRIZE}, a tree that sings all by itself whenever the breeze blows; they add one small shell of their own to the branches so it will sing a little louder; they walk home humming its happy tune
beats.e_set_shed: {B1_DEADEND_PATH} is just a cobwebby dead end with old plant pots and a {B1_DEADEND_FIND}; the friends back out sneezing and laughing, dust {MAP} off, and trot back to {ENTRANCE} for {COMFORT_TREAT} before trying another trail
beats.e_fort: the friends have found {B1_PRIZE}, snug and hidden in the top of {ROUTE_B_LURE}, all ready for new explorers; they write their own names in the little logbook on the shelf and promise to come back and take good care of it; this will be their headquarters from now on
beats.e_set_rock: {B2_DEADEND_PATH} is just a snug home for a line of busy {B2_DEADEND_FIND} marching to and fro, with no treasure to be seen; the friends say a polite hello to the {B2_DEADEND_FIND}, roll up {MAP}, and wander back to {ENTRANCE} for {COMFORT_TREAT}
beats.e_marbles: the friends have dug up {B2_PRIZE}, left as treasure by a kid from long ago; they choose two favorites to keep and leave the rest tucked back with a note of their own for the next lucky finder; they walk home clinking a marble in each pocket
beats.e_set_bramble: {C1_DEADEND_PATH} just ends in a thick tangle of thorns too prickly to pass, with only a lost {C1_DEADEND_FIND} caught on a branch; the friends carefully back out without a single scratch, laugh at the silly {C1_DEADEND_FIND}, and head up to {ENTRANCE} for {COMFORT_TREAT}
beats.e_cat: the friends have found {C1_PRIZE} living happily in {C1_ZONE_HINT}; they share their afternoon snack with their new pal and promise to visit every single day and help find where he belongs; he walks them halfway home with his tail held high
beats.e_set_bank: {C2_DEADEND_PATH} at the water's edge holds nothing but a shiny wet pebble and one very surprised {C2_DEADEND_FIND}; the friends grin at their muddy sneakers, wave hello, and hop back across the stones for {COMFORT_TREAT}
beats.e_buttons: the friends have unearthed {C2_PRIZE}, the real treasure at the end of the map; they pick one gleaming button each to keep as a memory and rebury the tin with a new note for the next explorer; they cross the stepping stones home feeling rich as kings
